case_title: GILDARDO BERMUDEZ CERNA VS. ANGELO MERCADO et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CERNA, GILDARDO BERMUDEZ AS TO DEFENDANT MERCADO, ANGELO , AN INDIVIDUAL GARCIA, RICHELLE RICKIE , AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CERNA, GILDARDO BERMUDEZ RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MERCADO, ANGELO , AN INDIVIDUAL GARCIA, RICHELLE RICKIE , AN INDIVIDUAL $6,062.85 PRINCIPAL, $83.71 INTEREST, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,296.56, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
